silhouette_language: Grounded, weighty realism: tooled dressed-stone blocks, hand-adzed timber, hand-forged iron fittings with authentic pitting and grime; expect asymmetry and per-piece age variation rather than uniform repetition.
vision_style_brief: Assets should read as historically grounded medieval construction under real weathering: muted stone and timber tones, dark forged-iron accents, believable grime and edge wear concentrated at handling points and ground contact. NOT: cartoon proportions, saturated primary colors, sci-fi emissive strips, pristine unweathered surfaces.
